design_philosophy: A clean, clinical, yet warm interface that prioritizes function, high data legibility, and a calm atmosphere for both healthcare providers and patients. Avoiding cold 'fintech blue' and generic 'SaaS purple'.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-none text-primary-text

button.primary: bg-[#7B9A82] text-white hover:bg-[#65826C] rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
button.secondary: bg-transparent border border-stone-200 text-[#1F2924] hover:bg-stone-50 rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
button.destructive: bg-[#C76D54] text-white hover:bg-[#B35F47] rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
button.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#5C6A61] hover:bg-stone-100 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

input.base: w-full border border-stone-200 rounded-sm px-4 py-2.5 bg-white text-[#1F2924] placeholder:text-[#A3AFA7] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#7B9A82]/20 focus:border-[#7B9A82] transition-all

table.header: border-b-2 border-stone-200 pb-3 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-[#5C6A61]

calendar.header: flex justify-between items-center p-4 border-b border-stone-200
calendar.appointment_block: bg-[#EDF2EE] border-l-2 border-[#7B9A82] text-xs p-2 rounded-r-sm mb-1 cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#E0EBE2]

sidebar.wrapper: w-64 border-r border-stone-200 bg-[#FAF9F6] h-screen fixed flex flex-col
sidebar.nav_item: flex items-center px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-[#5C6A61] hover:bg-[#F5F5F0] hover:text-[#1F2924] transition-colors
sidebar.nav_item_active: flex items-center px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-[#1F2924] bg-[#F5F5F0] border-l-2 border-[#7B9A82]

top_nav.wrapper: h-16 border-b border-stone-200 bg-white flex items-center justify-between px-6 sticky top-0 z-50
top_nav.user_profile: flex items-center gap-3 text-sm font-medium text-[#1F2924]

auth_background.description: Bright and clean medical waiting room with modern seating. Use as a background on the Login/Register split screen.

doctor_avatar_placeholder.description: Portrait of a calm male doctor. Use as placeholder for the provider profile.

empty_state_abstract.description: Abstract spine X-ray. Use carefully in empty states (desaturated, low opacity) to add a clinic-specific touch.

testing.data_testid_rule: All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based. E.g., data-testid='appointment-book-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. DO NOT USE Tailwind's default blue, purple, or indigo.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a clean, line-based UI that matches the clinical tone.
Ensure the sidebar navigation is collapsible. Provide role-based conditional rendering for navigation links.
For the calendar, implement a custom CSS grid or use a library that supports clean, border-based bento cells without heavy box-shadows.
Add empty state illustrations using the provided abstract imagery, applying grayscale and opacity filters (`grayscale opacity-30`) to keep them subtle.
Use Shadcn components for forms, dialogs, and dropdowns, but heavily customize them to use `rounded-sm` and the stone/sage color palette.
